since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +5.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.74% · BTC -3.05% · Gold +0.40% · Nasdaq100 +1.65%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +5.52%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +5.52%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +26.95%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +26.95%, AVAV +19.46%, CEVA +8.84%, KLAC +8.61%, SYM +7.78%. Laggards: DLR -4.74%, TTD -3.83%, PINS -3.70%, HON -3.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.45% at $169.85
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.45% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
